title: FantasyCraft (Mythical Creatures)
description: Venture into a realm of enchantment and adventure with our fantasy-themed Minecraft modpack! Embark on epic quests, battle mythical creatures as you explore a vast, immersive world!
body:
Prepare to confront legendary creatures, fearless Vikings, and cunning goblins in our mythical modpack for Minecraft! Journey through a realm where dragons soar the skies, wreaking havoc upon villages and kingdoms. Fend off the pillaging Vikings, who seek conquest and glory at any cost. But beware the lurking goblins, whose insatiable greed drives them to plunder and hoard precious treasures. With a host of mods that bring these fantastical beings to life, your Minecraft world will be teeming with adventure, danger, and the thrill of facing mythical foes.

Side Note: Essentials may be taken out essentials is just to allow you to play with your friends. Also make sure to equip the texture packs.

Perfered if inferno is installed [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infernos-httyd](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/infernos-httyd)
